name: Pollo Con Frutta Secca
recipeIngredient: Chardonnay or dry white wine (3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chicken pieces, minced garlic, dried oregano, olive oil, red wine vinegar, prunes, dried apricots, bay leaves, green olives, capers, and caper juice.
2. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 24 hours.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Arrange the chicken in a single layer in a shallow baking pan, spooning the marinade evenly over each piece of chicken.
5. Sprinkle with brown sugar and pour the Chardonnay or dry white wine around the chicken.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, basting every 15-20 minutes.
7. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the chicken, fruit, olives, and capers to a serving platter.
8. Pour several spoonfuls of pan juices over the chicken.
9. Serve the remaining pan juices in a sauceboat. Any dry white wine may be substituted for Chardonnay.
